caption:
The neon hum of Neo-Tokyo never sleeps, but my skin burns with the heat of the midsummer sun. 🌞

I adjusted my holographic bikini straps, feeling the phantom sensation of a thousand eyes on my curves. The humidity clung to every pore, making my cybernetic implants tingle with static electricity. A sudden alert flashed across my ocular implant: a VIP transport was stuck in the lower sectors due to a grid surge. My job? Escort the client through the chaotic sprawl of the city's underbelly. 

The streets were a sensory overload—sizzling asphalt, the smell of ozone and synthetic flowers, the rhythmic thrum of passing hover-cars. I moved with fluid grace, my synthetic muscles humming beneath my skin. The client, a corp exec, stumbled in the doorway, his synthetic suit shimmering in the rain that hadn't quite fallen yet. 

"You're the only one who can make this hell look glamorous," he murmured, stepping closer. His hand brushed my hip, sending a jolt through the haptic feedback suit beneath my bikini. We moved together through the market, the air thick with the scent of chrome and desire. Every step was a dance, every glance a promise. 

As we neared the secure drop-off, his eyes locked on mine. The city lights reflected in our pupils, a mirror of neon and night. He pulled me close, whispering, "For the record, the view is stunning." A smirk played on my lips, and I felt the power of the moment, the thrill of the unknown, the electric pulse between us. 

The ride up to his penthouse was smooth, the gravity field adjusting to our every move. We entered his suite, the air cooling down, the heat of the city fading into the background. The door closed, and the real adventure began. 

#CyberpunkSummer #NeonDesires #FutureLove #SciFiErotica #CyberBabe
